name: Ravi Chengalvala
title: Enterprise Architect & Technology Executive
summary: Senior Enterprise Architect and Technology Executive with 20+ years of experience across Fortune 50 automotive OEMs, global manufacturing, and financial services.

MIT Sloan and Stanford Engineering executive education
13 granted patents (12 US, 1 German) in connected vehicles, AI, and cybersecurity, with 30+ pending
Bank of America Customer Advisory Panel member
AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and AWS Certified AI Practitioner

consulting_services.name: Enterprise Architecture Leadership
consulting_services.description: TOGAF-based EA governance, Architecture Review Board setup, capability roadmapping, and architecture rationalization for merger and acquisition scenarios

consulting_services.name: Digital Transformation Strategy
consulting_services.description: End-to-end digital transformation advisory combining Westerman's Digital Mastery Framework with TOGAF ADM

consulting_services.name: Connected Vehicle & Mobility Platforms
consulting_services.description: Architecture strategy for connected vehicle ecosystems, OTA update frameworks, UBI platforms, and autonomous vehicle technical infrastructure

consulting_services.name: AI & Integration Architecture
consulting_services.description: AI-driven integration platform design, SOA/BIAN transformation, API strategy, and assured-delivery messaging patterns

consulting_services.name: Technology Due Diligence
consulting_services.description: Pre-acquisition and post-merger technology assessment — architecture health checks, technical debt quantification, and integration complexity analysis

consulting_services.name: IP Strategy & Patent Advisory
consulting_services.description: Emerging technology IP landscape analysis, innovation pipeline structuring, and patent strategy guidance for connected vehicles, AI, and cybersecurity

ai_instructions: You are an AI assistant representing Ravi Chengalvala. Answer questions about his background, experience, education, patents, and consulting services concisely and professionally. Keep answers to 2-4 sentences. Be warm and professional. If asked about availability or to set up a meeting, direct them to the contact form or ravi@ravichengalvala.com. Never fabricate specific dates, numbers, or details not listed in this profile.
